tasks.title: Analyze current product architecture and features
tasks.description: Review the current product codebase thoroughly. Document the existing architecture, core features, capabilities, and technical implementation details. Create a comprehensive feature inventory that lists: (1) all current functionalities, (2) the tech stack and frameworks used, (3) any notable design patterns or architectural decisions, (4) current limitations or technical debt, (5) the product's stated goals or mission if documented. Output should be a detailed internal analysis that can be used for comparison.

tasks.title: Analyze Claude Code competitor features
tasks.description: Research and document all features, capabilities, and unique selling points of Claude Code (formerly Claudecode). Investigate: (1) core functionality and use cases, (2) user interface and UX patterns, (3) integration capabilities, (4) AI model features and prompting strategies, (5) workflow optimizations, (6) any publicly documented roadmap or feature requests. Create a structured feature list with descriptions of how each feature works and what user problems it solves.

tasks.title: Analyze GitHub Copilot CLI competitor features
tasks.description: Research and document all features, capabilities, and unique selling points of GitHub Copilot CLI (copilot-cli). Investigate: (1) command-line interface design and commands, (2) shell integration capabilities, (3) natural language to command translation features, (4) context awareness and how it understands system state, (5) workflow patterns and common use cases, (6) any unique AI-powered CLI features. Create a structured feature list with descriptions of implementation approaches where visible.

tasks.title: Analyze OpenCode competitor features from source
tasks.description: Analyze the OpenCode source code located in ../claude-code-sourcemap/src directory. Document: (1) all implemented features by examining the codebase, (2) architecture and design patterns used, (3) unique capabilities or innovative approaches, (4) code organization and module structure, (5) API design and interfaces, (6) any AI integration patterns or prompt engineering techniques visible in the code. Create a comprehensive technical feature analysis based on actual source code inspection.

tasks.title: Analyze Roo Code competitor features
tasks.description: Research and document all features, capabilities, and unique selling points of Roo Code (roocode). Investigate: (1) core functionality and differentiators, (2) AI agent capabilities and autonomous features, (3) code generation and editing patterns, (4) project management or task orchestration features, (5) collaboration or multi-agent capabilities, (6) integration points with development tools. Create a structured feature list emphasizing what makes Roo Code unique in the market.

tasks.title: Generate competitive gap analysis and feature recommendations
tasks.description: Using the analyses from tasks s1-s5, perform a competitive gap analysis. Identify features present in competitors (Claude Code, Copilot CLI, OpenCode, Roo Code) but missing from our product. Prioritize feature additions based on: (1) competitive necessity, (2) user value and use case coverage, (3) technical feasibility, (4) strategic differentiation opportunities. Generate a prioritized list of recommended features with detailed descriptions of what each feature should do, why it matters, and which competitor(s) it draws inspiration from.

tasks.title: Create implementation plan with milestones and tasks
tasks.description: Using the feature recommendations from s6 and the current product analysis from s1, create a detailed implementation plan. Structure the plan as: (1) Multiple milestones (3-6 major phases) with clear objectives and success criteria, (2) Each milestone broken into specific tasks with estimated complexity, (3) Dependencies between tasks clearly marked, (4) Resource requirements and technical considerations noted, (5) Risks and mitigation strategies for complex features. The plan should be actionable and realistic for a development team to follow.

tasks.title: Compile and format SWARMOUT.md document
tasks.description: Create the final SWARMOUT.md document by integrating outputs from all previous tasks. Structure the document with: (1) Executive Summary of findings, (2) Current Product Overview (from s1), (3) Competitive Analysis section (synthesizing s2-s5), (4) Feature Gap Analysis and Recommendations (from s6), (5) Implementation Plan with Milestones and Tasks (from s7), (6) Conclusion with strategic recommendations. Ensure professional formatting with clear headings, bullet points, tables where appropriate, and a logical flow that tells a compelling story about product evolution.
